message:
chore(beads): close ft-zcdyn — fix already in 0f15e1bc

ft-zcdyn (P1) claimed runtime_async_surface_guard still allowlisted
runtime_compat.rs after the ft-g43fq rename. Verification at HEAD:
allowed_raw_runtime_files() returns ["runtime_async.rs", "cx.rs"]
(zero runtime_compat refs in the file); the in-module test
allowed_raw_runtime_files_contains_only_runtime_async_and_cx passes.
The fix landed in the rename commit itself. Bead description was
stale; no code change needed.

Closes ft-zcdyn.
